subcodes.title: Words to a young believer, spoken on 1914-03-10
subcodes.first_line: Were it not for the favors of the Blessed Perfection, no one would have given us any importance. There are some who become proud and haughty... Meekness and humility are the hallmarks of faith.... There are no officers in this Cause... The foundation of this Cause is pure, spiritual democracy and not a theocracy.
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge, @humility; meekness; lowliness
